title: End-to-end smoke: add_memory and search from laptop
userStory: As an operator, I want a one-off script that proves an episode round-trips into Graphiti so that Workstream A is provably done before migration starts.
acceptanceCriteria: Script (Python) calls add_memory via MCP JSON-RPC (POST /mcp/ with method=tools/call) using sample text 'met Alice at Acme on May 9 to discuss the engineering role'
Script polls search_nodes(query='Acme') until the entity appears or a 90s timeout fires (add_memory is fire-and-forget; extraction is queued)
Asserts that the Acme node is present in search results
--second flag posts a follow-up episode ('had coffee with Alice from Acme') and asserts no new Acme/Alice nodes appeared (dedup smoke)
Script lives at scripts/smoke_brain.py and is documented in README
